long_description:
Users using the Dashboard / Cloudflare APIs are impacted as requests might fail and/or errors may be displayed.
https://www.cloudflarestatus.com/incidents/lfrm31y6sw9q
short_description: CIS users not able to manage resources due to ongoing Cloudflare incident
close_notes: Issue recovered once Cloudflare was available again.
customer_facing_impact: Customers using the Dashboard / Cloudflare APIs are impacted as requests might fail and/or errors may be displayed.
chronology:
Response Team Participants (add abbrev. role and name as needed)
=====================
SRE(s): Kevin Holohan
DEV:
MGR: 
iPOPs:
AVM: Nikolay Parvov, TOC AVMs
Exec: Muhammad Ali

Slack(s): #warroom-vpc-inc10481030 - https://ibm.enterprise.slack.com/archives/C0A1RSPD97U
               #cis-cie - https://ibm-cloudplatform.slack.com/archives/CDN54GYRE/p1764933675700579?thread_ts=1764926006.558989&cid=CDN54GYRE
MS Teams: https://teams.microsoft.com/l/meetup-join/19%3ameeting_ZmFjNzA5YmYtODViMS00OTZjLWIyNjktNDI0NTkyZTJhOTJm%40thread.v2/0?context=%7b%22Tid%22%3a%22fcf67057-50c9-4ad4-98f3-ffca64add9e9%22%2c%22Oid%22%3a%223b98fa1e-3c72-4e87-86c6-2b3467c59008%22%7d


Times in UTC
[2025-Dec-05]
08:45 AAA Impact Start
09:07 AAA Sev2 CIE Confirmed
09:08 AAA <Nikolay Parvov> Joining as AVM OnDuty

09:13 CORE VSIs provisioning failures across all regions. CLoudflare is down
09:14 CORE updated that services stat to see recovery
09:15 CORE A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.
09:23 Cloudflare have resolved their INC
09:47 AVM Cloudflare mitigation time is 09:12
09:50 AVM an update from Cloudflare status page (posted Dec 05, 2025 - 09:20 UTC ): A change made to how Cloudflare's Web Application Firewall parses requests caused Cloudflare's network to be unavailable for several minutes this morning. This was not an attack; the change was deployed by our team to help mitigate the industry-wide vulnerability disclosed this week in React Server Components. We will share more information as we have it today.




=============================
               FOR AVM REFERENCE
=============================
Time stamp was updated to 08:47, since the first errors for CIS service were reported at that time
Link to Cloudflare status page: https://www.cloudflarestatus.com/incidents/lfrm31y6sw9q
